message:
feat(resize): memory-pressure-aware controls for multi-tab scrollback resize (wa-1u90p.5.5)

resize_memory_controls.rs (NEW):
- ResizeMemoryPolicy engine that maps MemoryPressureTier (Green/Yellow/
  Orange/Red/Critical) to concrete resize parameters: batch sizes,
  overscan caps, backlog limits, and compaction triggers.
- Higher pressure tiers progressively reduce memory impact of resize
  operations while preserving viewport responsiveness.
- ResizeMemoryConfig with per-tier batch size, overscan cap, and
  compaction trigger thresholds.
- Comprehensive test coverage for tier transitions and parameter scaling.

lib.rs: Register resize_memory_controls module.

surface/lib.rs: Add explicit type annotations to Vec allocations in
dirty_rects_region and diff_line_spans for clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
